# table_refs { #cdmconnector.table_refs }

```python
table_refs(domain_ids)
```

Return domain_id -> table name and column names (concept_id, start_date, end_date).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name       | Type        | Description                                         | Default    |
|------------|-------------|-----------------------------------------------------|------------|
| domain_ids | list\[str\] | Domain IDs (e.g. "condition", "drug", "procedure"). | _required_ |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description                                                                                                                |
|--------|------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame | Columns: domain_id, table_name, concept_id, start_date, end_date (concept_id/start_date/end_date are column name strings). |
